---
title: "Mapping and network analysis"
subtitle: "20 April 2026"
format: html
---

## Reading
Background reading on mapping or network analysis. Find one or more sources that are related to what you want to do for your project. Add resources to the shared [Zotero Library](https://www.zotero.org/groups/6406819/vts/library).

## Assignment
- Create a quarto document that makes an analysis of data from your project.
- Commonplace book writing: What are you excited to work on? What skills do you need to concentrate on improving?

## Activities
- Time to go over visualization, mapping, and networks.
- Practice and plan for website projects.

## Resources
- [Resources: Mapping in R](../resources/mapping.qmd)
- [Resources: Networks in R](../resources/networks.qmd)
